title: DismountEntityPlugin
description: 🚏 Allows players to release entities and mobs from boats and minecarts without breaking them.
body:
## What is this This plugin is a fork of the **Dismount Entity mod**, ported to a **plugin**. It allows players to dismount mobs from boats, minecarts, and other **(modded)** vehicles by **crouch** + **right-clicking** the **vehicle**. This lets them get out without **breaking** the vehicle. Dismounting other **players** is disabled by default but can be enabled via the config. ## Configurable beAbleToDismountOtherPlayers (**default = false**): Whether players can dismount other players from their vehicle. ## Here's how it works:
Spoiler
